donate(address,uint256[],bytes).details: This is a permissioned function, intended to be used to donate amounts to CoW AMM pools. On success, emits a CoWDonation event. userData may be used to explain the reason of the CoWDonation.

params.donationAmounts: Amount of tokens to donate + protocol fees, sorted in token registration order
params.pool: The pool that receives the donation
params.userData: Additional (optional) data sent with the donate request

donateHook((address,address,uint256[],by.details: Can only be called by the Vault.

params.params: Donate params (see ICowRouter for struct definition)

params.selector: The 4-byte selector of the permissioned function

getCollectedProtocolFees(address).details: The protocol fees collected by the CoW Router stay in the CoW router contract.

returns.fees: Protocol fees collected for the specific token

returns._0: The maximum value of protocol fee percentage

getProtocolFeePercentage().details: The protocol fee percentage is used to calculate the amount of protocol fees to charge on a donation. The fees stay in the router.

setFeeSweeper(address).details: Fee Sweeper cannot be the zero address.

params.newFeeSweeper: Address of the new fee sweeper

setProtocolFeePercentage(uint256).details: This is a permissioned function. The protocol fee percentage is capped at a maximum value, registered as a constant in the CoW AMM Router.

params.newProtocolFeePercentage: New value of the protocol fee percentage

swapAndDonateSurplusHook((address,addres.details: Can only be called by the Vault.

params.swapAndDonateParams: Swap and donate params (see ICowRouter for struct definition)

returns.swapAmountIn: Exact amount of tokenIn of the swap
returns.swapAmountOut: Exact amount of tokenOut of the swap

swapExactInAndDonateSurplus(address,addr.details: This is a permissioned function, intended to be called only by a `CoW Settlement` contract. CoW AMM matches transaction tokens outside of the pool, and donates fees (surplus) back to the pool. Therefore, the swap has no fees, but protocol fees are charged on the donation amount. On success, it emits a CoWSwapAndDonation event.

params.donationAmounts: Amount of tokens to donate + protocol fees, sorted in token registration order
params.pool: The pool with the tokens being swapped
params.swapDeadline: Deadline for the swap, after which it will revert
params.swapTokenIn: The token entering the Vault (balance increases)
params.swapTokenOut: The token leaving the Vault (balance decreases)
params.transferAmountHints: Amount of tokens transferred upfront, sorted in token registration order
params.userData: Additional (optional) data sent with the swap and donate request

returns.exactAmountOut: Number of tokenOut tokens returned from the swap

swapExactOutAndDonateSurplus(address,add.details: This is a permissioned function, intended to be called only by a `CoW Settlement` contract. CoW AMM matches transaction tokens outside of the pool, and donates fees (surplus) back to the pool. Therefore, the swap has no fees, but protocol fees are charged on the donation amount. On success, it emits a CoWSwapAndDonation event.

params.donationAmounts: Amount of tokens to donate + protocol fees, sorted in token registration order
params.pool: The pool with the tokens being swapped
params.swapDeadline: Deadline for the swap, after which it will revert
params.swapTokenIn: The token entering the Vault (balance increases)
params.swapTokenOut: The token leaving the Vault (balance decreases)
params.transferAmountHints: Amount of tokens transferred upfront, sorted in token registration order
params.userData: Additional (optional) data sent with the swap and donate request

returns.exactAmountIn: Number of tokenIn tokens charged in the swap

withdrawCollectedProtocolFees(address).details: Permissionless because the fee sweeper (receiver of protocol fees) is defined by a variable with a permissioned setter. Emits the ProtocolFeesWithdrawn event on success.

params.token: Token in which the protocol fees were charged

donate(address,uint256[],bytes).notice: Executes a donation of a specified amount to a CoW AMM Pool.

donateHook((address,address,uint256[],by.notice: Hook for donating values to a CoW AMM pool.

getActionId(bytes4).notice: Returns the action identifier associated with the external function described by `selector`.

getCollectedProtocolFees(address).notice: Returns the protocol fees collected by the CoW Router for a specific token.

getFeeSweeper().notice: Gets the address that will receive protocol fees on withdrawal.

getMaxProtocolFeePercentage().notice: Returns the maximum protocol fee percentage.

getProtocolFeePercentage().notice: Returns the protocol fee percentage, registered in the CoW Router.

setFeeSweeper(address).notice: Sets the address that will receive protocol fees on withdrawal.

swapAndDonateSurplusHook((address,addres.notice: Hook for swapping and donating to a CoW AMM pool.

swapExactInAndDonateSurplus(address,addr.notice: Executes an ExactIn swap and donates a specified amount to the same CoW AMM Pool.

swapExactOutAndDonateSurplus(address,add.notice: Executes an ExactOut swap and donates a specified amount to the same CoW AMM Pool.

withdrawCollectedProtocolFees(address).notice: Withdraws collected protocol fees to the fee sweeper.
